name: IdsEdwCmnPrctLangDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH Q1 AS ( SELECT CMN.CMN_PRCT_LANG_SK, COALESCE(CD2.TRGT_CD, 'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, CMN.CMN_PRCT_ID, CMN.LANG_SEQ_NO, CMN.CMN_PRCT_SK, CMN.LANG_DESC FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CMN_PRCT_LANG CMN LEFT OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD2 ON CMN.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD2.CD_MPPNG_SK ) SELECT Q1.CMN_PRCT_LANG_SK, Q1.SRC_SYS_CD, Q1.CMN_PRCT_ID, Q1.LANG_SEQ_NO AS CMN_PRCT_LANG_SEQ_NO, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, Q1.CMN_PRCT_SK, Q1.LANG_DESC AS CMN_PRCT_LANG_DESC, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM Q1

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2005 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


JOB NAME:     EdwCmnPrctLangExtr

    

INPUTS:
	IDS - CMN_PRCT_LANG
  
TRANSFORMS:  
                  TRIM all the fields that are extracted or used in lookups
                           
PROCESSING:
                  IDS - read from source, lookup all code SK values and get the natural codes
                
  
OUTPUTS: 
                    CMN_PRCT_LANG_D.dat

MODIFICATIONS:    
                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
     DEVELOPER            DATE                 PROJECT          DESCRIPTION                              ENVIRONMENT                 REVIEWER                 REVIEW
-----------------------------     ----------------------     --------------------        --------------------------------------------       -------------------------------              ------------------------------       --------------------
Oliver Nielsen             09/07/2005       Originally Programmed

Leandrew Moore        06/07/2013       5114                    rewrite in parallel                              EnterpiriseWrhsDevl        Jag Yelavarthi               2013-08-27

Annotations:
Pull the matched set of products fron IDS and move to EDW.
Read from source table CMN_PRCT_LANG from IDS.  Apply Run Cycle filters when applicable to get just the needed rows forward
This is a load ready file conforms to the target table structure.

Write this into a Dataset if the data goes into a PKEY job otherwise write this info into a Sequential file

Please use Metadata available in Table definitions to support data Lineage.
